universityIndex.title: Building African leadership
universityIndex.intro1: The Digital University of Morocco (UNM) is a higher-education institution dedicated to executive education, with a vocation resolutely turned toward Africa and its dynamics of transformation.
universityIndex.intro2: Through an academic offering structured around executive education, UNM supports executives, leaders and future leaders in developing the strategic, managerial and decision-making skills required by African realities.
universityIndex.intro3: Positioned at the intersection of academic excellence and operational stakes, UNM favours an action-oriented approach, integrating African case studies, field experience and international openness.
universityIndex.missionBody: Contribute actively to the emergence of an innovative, responsible African leadership able to take on the continent's economic, social and technological challenges.

ebs.title: UNM × EBS Paris
ebs.description: A partnership combining academic excellence, international openness and grounding in African economic realities. DBA, sectoral MBAs and Executive certificates.
ebs.pillar2Body: Content adapted to African economic realities.
ebs.pillar3Body: Real-world cases, skill growth, tangible transformation.
